items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for tracking bookings by source.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement to track bookings by source (Instagram vs Facebook vs website). However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this functionality is implemented. The linked use case mentions the need for tracking bookings by source but lacks specific evidence demonstrating that this requirement is satisfied, leading to an inconclusive status.
